raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Validate parameters against real data to ensure psychometric soundness"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "question pool", "issue": "Question pool size per competency may be less than 15", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for reliable CAT differentiation"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "No evidence of DIF analysis for bias against AZ/CIS test-takers", "recommended_fix": "Perform DIF analysis to ensure fairness and equity"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be appropriately set", "recommended_fix": "Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal assessment termination"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "temporal decay rationale", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based", "recommended_fix": "Investigate and validate temporal decay rationale with empirical evidence"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Validate parameters against real data to ensure psychometric soundness

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency may be less than 15
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for reliable CAT differentiation

findings.issue: No evidence of DIF analysis for bias against AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Perform DIF analysis to ensure fairness and equity

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriately set
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal assessment termination
Investigate and validate temporal decay rationale with empirical evidence
